text:
Created attachment 180689
Proposed patch (since 431169 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.3 to 1.6.4 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.3...v1.6.4
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.4/NEWS#L1-L7

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
